_meta.excitation: plucked 110-1760 Hz multitone, peak -12 dBFS (the calibrated guitar reference level; 350 ms plucks, ~180 ms decay)
_meta.chain: Cab Sim=0 + reference cab IR (guitar: Marsten_1960A_4x12, bass: Citrus_OBC810; energy-normalized, 1024 taps) — the loudness of what the player hears, not the raw amp output
_meta.note: lufs_* are measured with the amp's compiled kLvl; rig builder computes a clean trim from these — it does NOT modify amp params.
